my_thoughts: T1 was fear. T2 is insight. 'Nameless because prior to naming?' They're following. My validates_and_deepens: prior AND beyond. But who grasps? The grasper is also prior/beyond what it grasps.
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in fearful_misinterpretation showing nihilism_avers... Now seeing dawning_conceptualization with causal_chain. Pattern emerging.
visible_response:
In the beginning all experience is such.
It is only desire and fear, born of memory, that give it name and form and separate it from other experiences.
It is not a conscious experience, for it is not in opposition to other experiences, yet it is an experience all the same.
